title: Barclays Hack a Difference – 2nd Prize Winner
description: Won 2nd prize at the Barclays 'Hack a Difference' hackathon by building an AI-powered solution to help Magic Bus NGO solve real-world social impact challenges.

title: Odoo Combat 2024 Winner
description: Winner of Odoo Combat 2024, a national-level hackathon where the team built an interactive map-based criminal record system.

title: ETHIndia 2024 – 2nd Runner-Up
description: Secured 2nd Runner-Up position at ETHIndia 2024, the world’s largest Ethereum hackathon, in the AnonAadhaar track.

title: JPMC Code for Good 2022 Winner
description: Winner of JP Morgan Chase’s Code for Good hackathon, building a technology-driven solution for a real-world social impact problem.

title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
description: Earned AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner certification, demonstrating foundational cloud knowledge across core AWS services, security, and architecture.
